listitem.para: Whether to use &IKEv2; (RFC 7296) or &IKEv1; (RFC 4301). The accepted values are &yes;, signifying only &IKEv2; is accepted, and &no;, signifying only &IKEv1; is accepted.

History: the original ikev2= parameter allowed the values &yes;, &no;, &propose;, &permit;, and &insist;; support for &propose;, &permit;, and &insist; was removed in &Libreswan; 3.28; the parameter ikev2= was deprecated in &Libreswan; 5.0.
